---
title: "README learnr folder"
subtitle: "Example files"
author: "Pedro J. Aphalo"
date: 2024-04-01
date-modified: 2024-04-01
resources: [logger_1.txt,my-data.xlsx,thiamin.sav]
categories: [books, R]
---

The files in this folder ([https://www.r4photobiology.info/learnr/](https://www.r4photobiology.info/learnr/)) are used in examples in the book "Learn R: As a Language", 1st (chapter 8) and 2nd (chapter 10) editions. Please, see the [_Learn R: As a Language_ own page](https://www.learnr-book.info/) for additional information about the book.
